# The Zero

> Family restaurant in Dhaka serving wood-fired grills, pizza, cafe drinks and desserts at the BAFWWA Shopping Complex.

The Zero is a two-floor family restaurant on Bir Uttam Ziaur Rahman Road, Dhaka 1212. Open daily from 10:00 AM to 11:00 PM. Phone: 01729-791000.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of The Zero, signature dishes and visit information.
- [Menu](/menu): Grilled chicken, wood-fired pizza, starters, cafe drinks and desserts with prices.
- [About](/about): Story, values and interior of the restaurant.
- [Contact](/contact): Address, phone, opening hours and directions.
